name: Live Adapters
notes: Phase B.2 Live Adapter Integration (D1 fifth target after 103→104→105→102). Authorization short name: 101-adapters / Live Adapters. Layer 2 remains prompts/modules/101-context-engine.md (Ready B.1) — live adapters were explicitly deferred in B.1; this slice does NOT re-open frozen B.1 orchestrator ownership. Own packages/ingestion/src/adapters/** only (live GraphQueryPort and optional lexical SemanticSearchPort / thin SummaryPort implementations that are structurally compatible with packages/core/src/context/types.ts PortMode + port interfaces). Consume frozen 101 B.1 public port contracts (read-only), frozen 102 SymbolRegistry/IndexDelta/reindexPath, frozen 103/104/105 public factories — do not rewrite B.1 engine/Null/Fake, parser/**, extractor/**, dependency/**, or incremental/** except documented defect fixes under separate module auth. B.2 freeze is independent of Memory Engine (201): in-process index + edge store only; true embeddings (semantic), architecture-summary engine, Graphiti/Neo4j, Gateway, Providers, and durable 201 graph are deferred. R1 (105 keysByFile multi-file ownership) remains accepted debt — adapters must not rewrite 105. Optional type-only / workspace dependency on @ray-studio/core for GraphQueryPort types is allowed; core must NOT gain a runtime dependency on @ray-studio/ingestion. Optional factory that returns port objects for createContextEngine wiring is in-scope under adapters/**; no required apps/studio host wiring for merge. Layer 4 defines B.2 independent freeze gates. Implementation not authorized by governance artifacts alone.
